expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: In result.md: “Phase 0 explicitly defines stable `REPORT_STATE` classification” with enumerated states (FINAL_EXISTS, DRAFT_EXISTS, CONTEXT_ONLY, FRESH) and “Phase 0 defines stable resume semantics” describing required user options (full_regenerate, smart_refresh, reuse/resume) and deterministic follow-on actions (apply_user_choice.sh and subsequent phase routing). execution_notes.md also states this was “Verified directly from reference.md `REPORT_STATE` + `selected_mode` tables”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: result.md section “Phase 0 outputs are clearly specified and phase-aligned” lists Phase 0 artifacts under context/ (runtime_setup_*.md/.json, supporting_issue_request_*.md, request_fulfillment_*.md/.json) and ties them to “skill_snapshot/SKILL.md → Phase Contract / Phase 0 / Output”. execution_notes.md likewise says: “Output aligns with primary phase phase0: Verified Phase 0 output artifact list is explicitly defined in SKILL.md.”
